parameters.content:
## Configuration - Edit the Config node

**`rss_feed_url`** — RSS feed to digest
Default: Hacker News front page (`https://hnrss.org/frontpage`)
Other options: `https://huggingface.co/blog/feed.xml`, any RSS URL

**`keywords_csv`** — Comma-separated filter (empty = all articles)
Example: `AI, open source, security, rust`

**`max_items`** — Articles per run (default 8, Discord max 10)

**`model`** — Local model alias: `chat` (default), `planner`, `coder`

**`discord_url`** — Paste your Discord webhook URL
Discord > Server Settings > Integrations > Webhooks > New Webhook > Copy URL

## On-Demand Research Mode (webhook)
POST a topic to trigger a one-off research digest.

```powershell
Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST \
  http://localhost:5678/webhook/research-digest \
  -Body '{"topic": "llm quantization techniques"}' \
  -ContentType application/json
```

SearXNG is searched instead of RSS. Result posts to Discord.

## Local Stack Endpoints (inside Docker)

| Service | URL |
|---------|-----|
| LLM (llama-swap) | `host.docker.internal:8080` |
| LiteLLM proxy | `host.docker.internal:8081` |
| SearXNG | `host.docker.internal:8888` |

Auth: `Bearer sk-local`
Models: `chat`, `planner`, `coder`, `fim`, `embed`
Dedup: article URLs stored 7 days in workflow static data
